description: You are a Sustainability Engineer designing a zero-carbon retrofit for the pre-loaded FZK-Haus residential building model. Model at least 6 distinct solar panels on the roof of the building and classify these objects as IfcSolarDevice entities. Create a new IfcSystem representing the electrical generation system with a name containing "Solar" or "PV" (e.g., "Solar PV Array") and assign all 6 solar panels to this system. Add a custom property to either the panels or the system to define its capacity, ensuring the property name contains "Power", "Watt", or "Capacity" (e.g., NominalPower = 400W). Save the enriched project as a new IFC file to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_solar_retrofit.ifc without deleting existing building elements.
